reasons: Johnson can deliver Odette directly into a fight and create the first impact window for her AoE damage.
Odette benefits from Johnson's engage because she can start her damage sequence without walking into danger alone.

proof.summary: Johnson provides delivery and engage timing, while Odette follows with Swan Song and bouncing magic damage.
worksBestWhen: Johnson drives after Odette is ready to cast.
Johnson crashes into enemy damage dealers or grouped enemies.
failureCases: Johnson crashes into a low-value target.
Odette is interrupted immediately after arrival.
The enemy anticipates the route and spreads.

reasons: Tigreal can group and control enemies, giving Odette a clean area to cast AoE damage.
Odette's damage becomes more reliable when enemies are already displaced or controlled before she commits.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates the grouped crowd-control window, while Odette converts that window into AoE magic damage.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal engages after Odette is close enough to follow.
Odette waits for the real control window instead of casting too early.
failureCases: Tigreal pushes enemies away from Odette's damage area.
Odette is interrupted during Swan Song.
Enemy cleanse or displacement breaks the combo timing.

reasons: Atlas can drag multiple enemies into one location, directly supporting Odette's area damage plan.
Odette can punish the pull area if she is already positioned to follow Atlas's engage.

proof.summary: Atlas groups enemies with a teamfight engage, while Odette follows with AoE damage during the control window.
worksBestWhen: Odette positions before Atlas completes the pull.
failureCases: Atlas is interrupted before finishing the engage.
Odette is too far to follow.
Enemy hard control is saved for Odette after the pull.

reasons: Carmilla's linked-target teamfight setup can make Odette's AoE damage more punishing when enemies are connected or grouped.
Carmilla can also help stand near the fight center so Odette has a safer moment to follow with damage.

proof.summary: Carmilla links enemies in a teamfight, while Odette adds AoE magic damage that benefits from enemies staying close together.
worksBestWhen: Odette casts after the link is confirmed.
failureCases: Odette is controlled before meaningful damage lands.

reasons: Minotaur can frontline, heal nearby teammates, and create airborne or slow control before Odette commits.
Odette benefits when Minotaur absorbs pressure and holds enemies near her damage area.

proof.summary: Minotaur starts or stabilizes the teamfight with frontline control and healing, while Odette follows when enemies are slowed, knocked airborne, or forced to fight near him.
worksBestWhen: Minotaur engages first and absorbs enemy control before Odette channels.
Odette casts after Minotaur's airborne or slow window begins.
Minotaur stays close enough to protect or heal Odette during the fight.
failureCases: Odette casts before Minotaur creates space.
Minotaur's crowd control misses or only hits the enemy frontline.
Enemy high-level crowd control is saved specifically to interrupt Odette's Swan Song.
